message:
test(proptest): expand lockfree (12→24) and agent_correlator (10→26) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

lockfree: Add ShardedGauge linearizability, ShardedMap linearizability,
concurrent gauge/map tests, insert_if_absent, retain, clear, shard
consistency, snapshot serde, fetch_add, and increment equivalence.

agent_correlator: Add ingest_detections tracking, state inference from
rule suffixes, Wezterm/Unknown filtering, session ID capture, pane title
detection (Claude/Codex/Gemini), process name detection, pattern priority
over title, remove_pane lifecycle, and multi-pane counting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
